Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answer To Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And Fo Sanctions
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. COLLEEN M. LI OF THE LAW OFFICES OF CATHERIN A. WALSH, TEL. NO. 1-925-825-9500 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT DIVYENDRA SINGH'S Motion To Compel Answer To Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And For Sanctions - The unopposed motion is granted. Plaintiff Ariana Agenbroad will respond without objections to Defendant Divyendra Singh's Form Interrogatories-General; Special Interrogatories, Set One; Special Interrogatories to Plaintiff, Set 2; Demand for Inspection and Production of Documents and Things, Set Number One; and Request for Production of Documents, Set 2; and pay monetary sanctions in the amount of $208.00 to Defendant; within 15 days of service of the order. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro tem: Dennis Hyde; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Not Reported. =302/JPT
